message:
fix: Handle assertRaises lambda returning !void instead of void

Lambda closures with assertRaises/assertRaisesRegex return !void
(error union) not void, because they can return ExpectedExceptionNotRaised.

- inferReturnType now returns !void for assertRaises methods
- lambdaReturnsVoid excludes assertRaises from void closure detection
- Body generation handles !void same as void (no explicit return)

This fixes compile error "error union is ignored" when calling
lambda closures that use assertRaises.
